name: Asmamaw
title: Barber
bio: Known for taking his time and paying close attention to detail, Asmamaw delivers precise fades, clean beard work, and traditional hot-towel shaves.

name: Joseph
title: Hair Stylist
bio: An amazing stylist with a passion for transformation — from chic bobs and glamorous waves to sleek updos, braids, and color.
